titles.en: Amīr al-mu’minīn's resolve to enact changes
Amīr al-mu’minīn's resolve to enact changes

segments: ٢٧٢. وَقَالَ (عليه ‏السلام): لَوْ قَدِ اسْتَوَتْ قَدَمَايَ مِنْ هذِهِ الْمَدَاحِضِ لَغَيَّرْتُ أَشْيَاءَ.
arabic.text: ٢٧٢. وَقَالَ (عليه ‏السلام): لَوْ قَدِ اسْتَوَتْ قَدَمَايَ مِنْ هذِهِ الْمَدَاحِضِ لَغَيَّرْتُ أَشْيَاءَ.

segments: 272. Amīr al-mu’minīn, peace be upon him, said: If my steps acquire firmness out of these slippery places, I will alter several things. [1]
en.sayed-ali-raza.text: 272. Amīr al-mu’minīn, peace be upon him, said: If my steps acquire firmness out of these slippery places, I will alter several things. [1]
